The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as digestive issues and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Dipsacus binata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Dipsacus binata are teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate various health issues.
